threshold_count: Aroused by watching an unwary person disrobing or having sex; has repeatedly acted on the urge OR feels distress/disability
duration_rule: 6 months; patient must be at least 18 years old

symptoms.description: The patient experiences recurrent, intense sexual arousal from observing an unsuspecting person who is naked, in the process of disrobing, or engaging in sexual activity.
The patient has acted upon voyeuristic sexual urges with a nonconsenting person.
The patient is at least 18 years of age.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Aroused by genital self-exposure to an unwary stranger; has repeatedly acted on the urge OR feels distress/disability

symptoms.description: The patient experiences intense sexual arousal from fantasies, urges, or behaviors involving genital self-exposure to an unwary stranger.
The patient has acted upon exhibitionistic urges to expose their genitals to a nonconsenting person.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Aroused by rubbing against or feeling someone who hasn’t consented; has repeatedly acted on the urge OR feels distress/disability

symptoms.description: The patient experiences intense sexual arousal from fantasies, urges, or behaviors involving touching or rubbing against a nonconsenting person.
The patient has acted upon sexual urges involving touching or rubbing against a nonconsenting person.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Repeated arousal from being struck, restrained, humiliated, or made to suffer; feels distress/disability OR has repeatedly acted on the urge

symptoms.description: The patient experiences sexual arousal from being struck, restrained, or made to suffer.
The patient acts upon sexual masochism urges with nonconsenting partners.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Aroused by another person's suffering; fantasies/behaviors cause distress/impairment OR has acted upon urges with nonconsenting person

symptoms.description: The patient experiences sexual arousal from the physical or psychological suffering of another person.
The patient acts upon sexual sadism urges with nonconsenting persons.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Aroused by sex with prepubescent children; has acted on the urge OR feels severe distress/interpersonal difficulties
duration_rule: 6 months; patient must be at least 16 and at least 5 years older than the victim

symptoms.description: The patient experiences intense and recurrent sexual arousal from fantasies, urges, or behaviors involving prepubescent children.
The patient has acted upon pedophilic sexual urges involving prepubescent children.
The patient is at least 16 years of age and is at least 5 years older than the prepubescent child or children involved.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Aroused by inanimate objects or body parts other than genitals; feels distress/disability OR has repeatedly acted on the urge

symptoms.description: The patient experiences intense sexual arousal from fantasies, urges, or behaviors involving the use of nonliving objects or a highly specific focus on nongenital body parts.
The patient has acted upon intense sexual urges involving nonliving objects or highly specific nongenital body parts.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Arousal by cross-dressing (thoughts, behaviors, or urges) has repeatedly caused distress or impairment

symptoms.description: The patient experiences recurrent, intense sexual arousal from the act of cross-dressing.
The patient experiences clinically significant distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to cross-dressing fantasies, urges, or behaviors.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Paraphilic symptoms that cause distress or impairment but do not meet full criteria for specific disorders (e.g., Zoophilia, Necrophilia)

symptoms.description: The patient experiences paraphilic symptoms that cause distress but do not meet the full diagnostic criteria for a paraphilic disorder.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.

threshold_count: Paraphilic disturbance present but clinician decide not to specify the reason

symptoms.description: The patient exhibits a paraphilic disturbance, but the clinician chooses not to specify the reason the criteria are not met for a specific paraphilic disorder.
The patient experiences clinically important distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning due to the symptoms.
